title: Diag Fearless Refactor v2
problem: Diagnostics is now a shared automation, debugging, and evidence platform. This lane keeps contracts, artifact vocabulary, and orchestration refactors coherent across CLI, GUI, MCP, and CI without reintroducing monolithic growth.

repro.summary: Resume this lane from the shared campaign and diagnostics authoring surfaces before touching deeper internals.
commands: cargo run -p fretboard -- diag doctor campaigns
cargo run -p fretboard -- diag campaign list

gates.name: campaign-doctor
gates.command: cargo run -p fretboard -- diag doctor campaigns

gates.name: campaign-manifest-validate
gates.command: cargo run -p fretboard -- diag campaign validate tools/diag-campaigns/ui-gallery-smoke.json

continue_policy.notes: Continue this lane for diagnostics contract, vocabulary, campaign, and maintainer-flow work. Split a new follow-on only when the ask no longer belongs to the shared diagnostics platform boundary.
